title: DiscriminationComplaint
description: A report of discrimination made to the NYC Commission on Human Rights — the everyday citizen transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for individual complaints; today a person files only through the untyped 'Report Discrimination' HTML form on nyc.gov/site/cchr/about/report-discrimination.page, by phone (311 / Law Enforcement Bureau), or in person. This schema types that intake and also serves the read surface (list/get a filer's own report and its case status). Field names are reconciled directly to the live intake form. No individual complaint data is published to Open Data (privacy by design).

complaintId.description: Server-assigned report / case number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Case lifecycle status. Set by the Commission (Law Enforcement Bureau / Office of Mediation), not the filer.

protectedClasses.description: The basis / bases of the alleged discrimination under the NYC Human Rights Law.

description.description: Free-text explanation of the issue or problem ('Please explain the issue or problem').

incidentDate.description: Date of most recent incident ('Date of most recent incident').

priorComplaint.description: Whether the filer has filed a complaint with the Commission before ('Have you filed a complaint with us before?').

involvementRequested.description: Whether the filer wishes to be involved in an official complaint. A report may be made whether or not the person wants to pursue a formal complaint.

complainant.description: The person making the report ('Your Name / Pronouns / Address / Email / Phone'). Optional — anonymous reports are accepted.

respondent.description: The person(s) and/or business who discriminated ('Name / Address or general location / Phone number of the person(s) and/or business').

location.description: Address or general location of the respondent.

attachments.description: Supporting files ('Upload attachment 1..3'). Up to three on the current form.

referralSource.description: How the filer heard about the Commission ('How did you hear about the Commission?').
enum: Community Relations Bureau of the Commission
